name: agent-project-bootstrap
description: Scaffold a runtime-agnostic multi-agent project: one persona.yaml hydrates working personas on any AI coding agent (Claude Code, code-puppy, ...) via per-runtime adapters. One front door (START.md → ORCHESTRATE/PARTICIPATE); the legacy v0.3 emit modes are deprecated and quarantined in legacy/. Also ships a sister skill — multi-agent-audit — for grading multi-agent projects against an evidence-based rubric (read-only). v1.5 ships the baron CLI (ADR-003/004): validate/status/ledgers/handoffs (M1–M3), the baron guard PreToolUse hook (deterministic capability enforcement on Claude Code), baron lock (PR-as-lock + CI lock-guard template), worktree topology tooling, and expiring status waivers.
